title: Status App: secure peer-to-peer private messenger
description: Status App combines an end-to-end encrypted messenger and a secure browser into a private, decentralized ecosystem with no phone number or email required.

sections.headline:
Private, secure
by design
sections.body: Message privately, manage your assets and browse the open web from one app that you alone control. No phone number, no tracking, no company in the middle.
Be unstoppable. Use the open-source, private messenger and asset manager.
